transforms: Queried Wikidata for the remaining district and subdistrict external ID gaps by administrative class, label, parent district, and GeoNames ID checks.
Added a Wikidata ID for Ariha District because the Wikidata item is typed as district of Syria and labelled Ariha District.
Did not replace the Ariha District GeoNames ID because the Wikidata item currently points to a settlement GeoNames ID while OpenSyria uses the GeoNames ADM2 record.
Added Wikidata IDs for six remaining Quneitra/Fiq/Sabe Byar subdistrict records where Wikidata items are typed as subdistrict of Syria and linked to the expected parent district.
Did not add subdistrict GeoNames IDs from Wikidata when those IDs were not present in the current GeoNames Syria dump used by this repository.
Left Damascus subdistrict without a Wikidata ID because the reviewed query returned only the existing district-level Damascus item, not a separate subdistrict item.
reviewNotes: Filled 1 district Wikidata ID and 6 subdistrict Wikidata IDs. Left 1 subdistrict Wikidata gap for Damascus and 6 subdistrict GeoNames gaps because no safe current-source match was available.
